description: CompositionMenthol green, round neck top made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and embellished print on the frontFitRegularWash careHand wash cold using mild detergentWash dark colours seperatelyTurn inside out before washing and dryingDo not bleach, iron or scrub on embroidery & printDo not wring or tumble dryFlat dry in shadeMild ironBe a stunner this summer in this menthol green, hand-beaded, embellished tee. Wear it on a fun day out, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. The stylish print on the front makes this top a true piece of art. Team it with jeans or summer shorts and chill out in style!Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
